## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_governance.py examples/minimal-project`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_public_safety.py .`

## Public safety

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, cookies, private paths, raw logs, target details, client data, or run-specific evidence.
- [ ] Project-specific details are expressed as placeholders or synthetic examples.
